projects.name: V2Ray
projects.author: v2fly
projects.description: Advanced tool for building proxy networks, supporting multiple protocols including VMess, VLESS, Trojan, etc. One of the most popular proxy solutions available

projects.description: Xray project core, supporting latest protocols like VLESS and XTLS. Outstanding performance with flexible configuration, a strong competitor to V2Ray

projects.name: sing-box
projects.author: SagerNet
projects.description: Universal proxy platform supporting proxy, rule-based routing, TUN mode, and more. Feature-rich with concise configuration

projects.author: Dreamacro
projects.description: High-performance proxy software written in Go, supporting Shadowsocks, VMess, Trojan, and more. Excellent rule-based routing capabilities

projects.name: mihomo

projects.description: Fork based on Clash.Meta, focused on better performance and more features. The spiritual successor to Clash Meta

projects.description: Secure SOCKS5 proxy implemented in Rust, supporting multiple encryption methods with excellent performance
